2125480.name: Outline Dust
2125480.description:
Outline Dust is an otherworldly arcade racing game, run through beautiful landscapes, but be careful not to get struck by lightning or abducted along the way, train your coordination and enjoy becoming the greatest pilot in the universe...

With a simple mechanic, the proposal of the game is to go through the scenarios as fast as possible
careful not to hit us with more obstacles or opponents, each level has been carefully designed to project beauty and difficulty, each with its own theme.
